name: The Atlantic
philosophy: American long-form literary editorial — paper-cream canvas, Domaine serif at 19px reading scale, Atlantic Red masthead voltage, drop-cap article openers, audio-narration as feature.

design_language.motion_signature: Almost none. 150ms hover on links; slow red progress indicator at top of long-form scroll; audio-narration controls fade in on article load.

trademark_signals: Atlantic Red as the brand's only voltage — masthead, section names, link hover
Drop caps on feature article openers — magazine convention preserved
Domaine Text body at 19px — larger than most digital pubs
Audio-narration option on most long-form articles
Full-bleed essay cover photography with type overlay
ai_slop_avoided: Don't render dark-mode hero on homepage
Don't add animated illustrations in body articles
